w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 wp14 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl

w:r.w:t: This assessment evaluates your ability to design and implement
that involve document understanding, classification, data extraction, and retrieval using
No hosted or paid AI services (e.g., OpenAI, Claude, Gemini) are allowed.
Read all PDF or text files from a provided folder (10–15 documents).
Extract and clean their text content.
Classify every file into one of the following categories:
It should allow the user to search documents by meaning, e.g.:
“Find all documents mentioning payments due in January.”
Demonstrate how this retrieval could extend into a
workflow using an open-source LLM (e.g., Mistral,
This part is optional and not
How to run the program locally
What libraries and methods were used
Not Allowed — Paid or hosted AI APIs (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.)
UI optional (CLI or API output is fine).
You will be provided with a
Use these files as input for your solution.
Zip your solution or upload it to GitHub.
